problem id: 7dec2e14
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  01010101 -> 11111101
  00010011 -> 00000101
  01110111 -> 10101001
  11110000 -> 01100001
  01010110 -> 10000101
  01101011 -> 11001010
  00101111 -> 01100010
  00001101 -> 00110110
  11100010 -> 10110011

query: 01011011
predicted answer: 01001100
